rulings.Case Title: JAMES TRUITT JR VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant Nacco'S Person Most Knowledgeable And Custodian Of Records And To Compel The Production Of Documents (Continued From 3/2/10 Hearing In Dept. 22o)
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, March 3, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the deposition of defendant NACCO¿s person most knowledgeable and custodian of records and to compel the production of documents was continued from February 18, 2010 on the court¿s own motion and from March 2, 2010 at the parties¿ request. If the parties have not fully resolved all issues raised by the motion, they must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4pm today stating, without further argument, what issues remain for resolution. In the event that the parties have not informally resolved all issues raised by the motion, the parties must appear at the hearing on March 3. = (220/HEK)
